title: Interoperability
summary: Arcium enables "Private Interoperability" architectures. Users and smart contracts can have secure, private interactions across different blockchains without publicly exposing the sensitive data contained within the cross-chain messages or payloads.
description: The Interoperability ecosystem built on Arcium.

bodySections.title: Why confidentiality matters in interoperability
bodySections.body: Cross-chain or cross-system messaging often carries high-value information. Confidentiality matters when the payload should accomplish coordination without broadcasting every sensitive detail to every observer.

bodySections.title: What to look for in Arcium-native interoperability
bodySections.body: Good examples protect the contents of messages, preserve the user or application privacy model across domains, and avoid making inter-chain coordination a source of unnecessary leakage.
